name: rentnest-backend-api
description: RentNest is a secure, scalable RRESTful backend API designed for a rental property marketplace. The platform connects tenants, landlords, and administrators in a single ecosystem where landlords can publish rental properties, tenants can request rentals and complete online payments, and administrators can monitor the entire platform. The system follows a role based access control(RBAC) architecture and implements a complete rental lifecycle -- from property discovery to payment confirmation and review submission.
author: Uhai Mong --Next Level Developer
